Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Continued To Apr-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on April 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Continued To Mar-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eli Coffino-Greeberg for (petitioner) Fiduciary Trust Company.

The Court stated that it has read the papers and asked if there was anything to add. Mr. Coffino-Greeberg asked for the court's opinion. The Court stated that the issues were briefed thoroughly, that there is little risk and that it looks good to go. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
